title: Hannibal, Missouri is a company town, and the local industry is Mark Twain. "The perfume of manufactured nostalgia hangs heavy in the air"
description: Hannibal, Missouri is a company town, and the local industry is Mark Twain. "The perfume of manufactured nostalgia hangs heavy in the air"
hook: Mark Twain's hometown has become a theme park of itself, and the irony is suffocating—manufactured nostalgia as economic survival.

title: ‘Night Nurse’ Review: Georgia Bernstein’s Moody Subversion of a Familiar Power Dynamic
description:
Bernstein’s gifts as a storyteller are less narrative than atmospheric.

The post ‘Night Nurse’ Review: Georgia Bernstein’s Moody Subversion of a Familiar Power Dynamic appeared first on
hook: A film that understands mood can do more narrative work than plot—Georgia Bernstein rewires a familiar power dynamic through pure atmosphere.

title: A Poet’s Account of the Power of the Yodel
description: The yodel: the perfect acknowledgment of that which cannot be hidden anymore and therefore also that which we have always had to hide. The yodel: the flickering Adam’s apple. Not unlike a sound we sometimes ever inadvertently make, a kind
hook: A poet explains the yodel as the sound of what can no longer be hidden—a completely unexpected entry point into vulnerability and embodiment.
